title: GlossPixelWeight
description:
GlossPixelWeight

Pixel Weight

A measure of the degree to which the pixel is part of a blob.  The Weight W of a pixel is a fraction between 0.0 and 1.0 inclusive, where the pixel represents W units of object and (1.0 - W) units of background.
  The weight of each pixel in an average image is determined by a weighting function that maps every grey level into a weight.
